fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Wyoming Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Wyoming - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity wyoming, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to wyoming, speech-language pathologist compact wyoming, wyoming speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Speech Pathology and Audiology
board.parent_dept: Wyoming Mental Health Professions Licensing Board
board.mailing_address: Wyoming Board of Speech Pathology and Audiology, 2001 Capitol Ave, Suite 105, Cheyenne WY 82002

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: Full credential for independent SLP practice in Wyoming.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Create a User Account
steps.description: Navigate to the Wyoming Professional Licensing System (proflic.wyo.gov) and select 'Register a New User' to establish your account with a unique username and password.

steps.title: Start New Application
steps.description: Log in to your account on the Wyoming Professional Licensing System, select 'Apply for a New License' and choose the 'Speech-Language Pathologist' application type.

steps.title: Complete Application and Upload Documents
steps.description: Fill out all required sections of the online application thoroughly within the Wyoming Professional Licensing System and upload necessary supporting documentation, such as official transcripts showing a master's or doctoral degree in SLP and official Praxis scores.

steps.title: Pay Application Fees
steps.description: Submit the non-refundable $100 application fee through the Wyoming Professional Licensing System using a credit card.

steps.title: Request Third-Party Verifications
steps.description: Arrange for any necessary verification forms (e.g., Verification of Supervised Clinical Practicum, Verification of Previous Licensure) and official transcripts to be sent directly to the Wyoming Board of Speech Pathology and Audiology by the issuing institutions or boards.

steps.title: Board Review and Initial Licensure Fee
steps.description: The Board will review your complete application during their scheduled meetings. Upon approval, you will be notified to pay the $200 initial licensure fee to finalize the licensing process.

telepractice_text: Wyoming permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Wyoming issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Wyoming is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Wyoming SLP license cost?
Is Wyoming part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Wyoming allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Wyoming have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Wyoming participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Wyoming without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Wyoming?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Wyoming while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Wyoming is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

hero.title: Become a Speech-Language Pathologist in Wyoming
hero.dek: To apply for an SLP license in Wyoming, applicants must register and complete their application through the Wyoming Professional Licensing System.

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to proflic.wyo.gov, click 'Register a New User' to create an account, then log in to start a new application, upload documents, and pay fees.
